privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy and data security is our top priority
privacy.intro: Saudi Horizon for Heavy Equipment Solutions is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL).
privacy.section1_content: We collect only information necessary to process your orders and provide technical support, including name, contact number, address, and vehicle/equipment details.
privacy.section2_content: Your information is used for completing purchases, tracking shipments, issuing tax invoices, and providing customized quotes for your industrial needs.
privacy.section3_content: We use advanced encryption technologies. No sensitive payment data is stored on our servers; it is processed via HyperPay, approved by the Saudi Central Bank (SAMA).

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Legal agreement for using Saudi Horizon services
terms.section1_content: By using the Saudi Horizon website, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. These services are intended for heavy equipment parts and OEM components.
terms.section2_content: All prices shown are subject to 15% VAT and are updated periodically based on the global availability of parts (ANC, Volvo, CAT, etc.).
terms.section3_content: Payments are accepted via mada, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and installments via Tabby/Tamara, as per SAMA regulations.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: Your rights are protected under Saudi E-Commerce regulations
returns.section1_content: Under Saudi E-Commerce Law, consumers have the right to return and receive a refund within 7 days of receipt, provided the product is in its original condition.
returns.section2_content: Returns do not include parts that have been installed, electrical parts, or parts imported specifically for the customer's request.
returns.section3_content: Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 7-14 business days after inspecting the returned product.

shipping.title: Shipping & Logistics
shipping.subtitle: Fast delivery to all KSA regions and GCC countries
shipping.section1_content: We ship to all cities across Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, etc.) and GCC countries via certified logistics partners.
shipping.section2_content: Delivery within Riyadh takes 24-48 hours, while other KSA cities take 3-5 business days.
shipping.section3_content: Costs are calculated based on weight (engines, turbos, hydraulic parts) and destination. Final costs appear at checkout.

story.label: OUR MISSION & STORY
story.p1: Since 2009, Saudi Horizon has been the trusted name in heavy equipment parts across the Middle East. What started as a specialized parts supplier in Dammam has grown into a regional leader.
story.p2: We understand that downtime costs thousands per hour. That's why we've built our entire operation around speed, reliability, and technical expertise.

t1.quote: Saudi Horizon provided exceptional service in sourcing hard-to-find parts for our heavy machinery fleet. Their delivery speed minimized our downtime significantly.
t1.author: Fahad Al-Otaibi

t2.quote: The quality of the refurbished equipment we purchased was outstanding. It performs like new but at a fraction of the cost. Highly recommended partner.
t2.author: John Smith

t3.quote: Their technical support team went above and beyond to help us identify the correct components for our vintage Caterpillar generators.
t3.author: Mohammed Asghar

faq.label: SUPPORT CENTER
faq.subtitle: Navigating complex industrial components can be challenging. Our technical team is here to provide clarity and ensure your operations remain uninterrupted.
faq.help_subtitle: Our engineers are available for immediate technical consultation.

q1.q: How do I ensure part compatibility for my Caterpillar equipment?
q1.a: We offer advanced cross-referencing for all major OEM part numbers. Simply provide your machine serial number to our experts, and we will verify the exact fitment using our proprietary database, ensuring 100% compatibility before shipment.

q2.q: What is the typical shipping lead time across the Kingdom?
q2.a: Our centralized distribution network in Riyadh allows for rapid fulfillment. Regular items are shipped within 24 hours, with typical delivery times of 1-3 business days depending on your location within Saudi Arabia.

q3.q: Do you provide warranty coverage for hydraulic components?
q3.a: Yes, all our high-performance hydraulic systems and components come with a standard 12-month manufacturer warranty. We also offer extended protection plans for critical infrastructure projects, ensuring minimum downtime.

q4.q: Can you source discontinued parts for older machinery models?
q4.a: Our global sourcing network specializes in identifying 'hard-to-find' and discontinued components for legacy fleets. We work directly with international manufacturers to procure or fabricate custom solutions that meet original specifications.

q5.q: Are your engine parts genuine OEM or high-quality aftermarket?
q5.a: We supply both Genuine OEM and premium ISO-certified aftermarket components. Every part in our inventory undergoes rigorous quality control testing to ensure it meets or exceeds the original performance standards of your equipment.
